title: 20pcs 18mm Pearl Effect Flat Back Rose Flower Resin Cabochons - Craft Embellishments (Baby Pink C27)
features: Add a luxe touch to your DIY craft creations with these rose-shaped flat-back cabochons. Each piece is 18 mm with a smooth, flat reverse for easy gluing to most clean, dry surfaces.
Pack of 20 cabochons rose flower design, flat back (no holes)
Crafted from lightweight and durable resin material.
Available in multiple colour variations so you can match themes and palettes
'MajorCrafts' is a UK registered trademark: UK00003145936
description: Add a luxe touch to your DIY craft creations with these rose-shaped flat-back cabochons. Each piece is 18 mm with a smooth, flat reverse for easy gluing to most clean, dry surfaces. The pearl-effect resin catches the light beautifully making them perfect for bridal crafts, card-making, scrapbooks, phone cases, mirrors, frames, hair accessories and gift décor. Supplied in a handy pack of 20. Choose from a range of colours on this listing.
